Endpoint.description: The endpoint to log the profile to.

Environment.description: The environment of the current request, e.g. 'prod' or 'dev'. Default defined in bootstrap.php

ExcludedEntryPoints.description: A list of entry points that are excluded from sampling. Default defined in bootstrap.php

ForcedParam.description: A query parameter that forces profiling when present. Default defined in bootstrap.php

Period.description: The period used by excimer. Default defined in bootstrap.php

PublicEndpoint.description: The public endpoint that can be used to view the profile. If null, defaults to $wgSpeedscopeEndpoint

SamplingRates.description: The sampling rates for each environment, between 0 and 1. Default defined in bootstrap.php

Token.description: The authentication token to send to the speedscope service
